title: geophila obvallata subsp. ioides
intro: Geophila obvallata subsp. ioides, also known as Ixora coccinea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geophila obvallata subsp. ioides include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
